verification.note: The Rs 10,000 threshold, the 90% payment threshold, and the 1% per month rate are long-standing, unchanged provisions of Sections 208 and 234B. Checked against multiple current filing guides; re-check only if a Budget/Finance Act amendment is reported. Section 234C (per-instalment interest) is deliberately not included here yet - see section_234c_status below.

source_refs: Income Tax Act, 1961, Section 208 (liability to pay advance tax)
Income Tax Act, 1961, Section 234B (interest for default in payment of advance tax)

values.section_234c_reason: Needs income dated by quarter to compute correctly - capital gains and dividends arising later in the year are excluded from earlier instalments, and this tool doesn't yet capture income by quarter.
